subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to God! The honoured pilgrim hath written a letter and made mention of thee therein, therefore I [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب الی الله جناب زائر نامه ای نوشته و ذکر شما را در نامه نموده لهذا من
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
